migration_notes: Mobile template gained a themed structure: constants/theme.ts color tokens (light/dark, read via useColors()), hooks/ (use-colors, use-color-scheme), a queries/ folder of data hooks, and a default app/(tabs)/ navigator. app.json now uses userInterfaceStyle: "automatic" and tsconfig adds the @/* path alias. Existing apps can keep their current layout; adopt the pieces they need.
Web queries/ files now export data hooks (useX wrapping useQuery/useMutation) instead of bare *Query option factories; components call the hook directly.

Web static assets (images, videos, fonts, audio) must live in packages/web/public/ and be referenced by absolute URL path (e.g. /images/hero.png); lint now rejects asset files and asset imports under packages/web/src/. Move any existing assets into public/ and update references.

New template Vite plugin vite/__plugins/asset-optimizer-plugin.ts optimizes all images and videos in the build output (sequential, cached, low resource usage; videos transcode via system ffmpeg when available, otherwise the build warns above 10MB); it must stay imported in vite.config.ts. packages/web gains a sharp devDependency.

The design brief now lives in a single design.md at the app root covering web, mobile, and desktop (packages/mobile/design.md was removed). The db:studio script was removed — query the database directly instead.
